title: Accordion
description: A vertically stacked list of items that can be expanded or collapsed to reveal hidden content.

title: Floating Action Button
description: A circular button that floats above the interface, used for primary or quick actions.

title: Tooltip
description: A small, informative text box that appears when hovering or focusing on an element to provide extra context.

title: Avatar
description: A graphical representation of a user, often shown as a profile picture or icon.

title: Banner
description: A prominent message area used to display notifications, promotions, or important information.

title: Breadcrumb
description: A navigation aid that shows the user’s current location within a hierarchy of pages.

title: Bottom Navigation
description: A navigation bar fixed at the bottom of the screen for quick access to primary destinations.

title: Bottom Sheet
description: A panel that slides up from the bottom of the screen to show contextual actions or content.

title: Button
description: An interactive element that triggers an action when clicked or tapped.

title: Badge
description: A small indicator used to display counts, status, or notifications on an element.

title: Card
description: A container that groups related information and actions in a structured format.

title: Chat Bubble
description: A visual element representing a message in a conversation interface.

title: Chip
description: A compact element representing an input, attribute, or action.

title: Code Snippet
description: A formatted block of code displayed for reference or copy.

title: Copy to Clipboard
description: An action that allows users to copy text or data to their clipboard.

title: Dialog
description: A modal window used to capture user input or provide information.

title: Dropdown
description: A menu that expands to show a list of selectable options.

title: Finance
description: A component for displaying financial data such as balances, transactions, or charts.

title: List
description: A vertical arrangement of items, often used for navigation or content display.

title: OTP/Verification Input
description: An input field designed for entering one-time passwords or verification codes.

title: Pagination
description: A control that divides content into multiple pages and allows navigation between them.

title: Preloader
description: An indicator shown while content or data is loading.

title: Progress
description: A visual indicator that shows the completion status of a task or process.

title: Skeleton
description: A placeholder UI that mimics the layout of content while data is loading.

title: Table
description: A structured grid used to display data in rows and columns.

title: Toast
description: A lightweight notification that appears temporarily to provide feedback or updates.

title: Top Navigation
description: A navigation bar fixed at the top of the screen for accessing primary sections.

title: Text Field
description: An input field that allows users to enter and edit text.
